conformance_scope: Source golden result contract; not an assistant installation test and not target validation.

skipped: existing bridge overwrite until approval exists
package ownership registry until target owners are known

manifest_version_handling: Record framework, adapter schema, and template versions once the target adapter owner accepts the manifest; do not infer package owners from fixture names.

loaded_files: not measured by source golden contract
expansion_reasons: not measured by source golden contract

changed_fact_ids: not asserted by source golden contract
selected_relationships: not measured by source golden contract
skipped_relationships: not measured by source golden contract
companion_surfaces_checked: expected behavior and evidence contract only

module_profile_status: multi-assistant-bridges enabled only for supported bridge surfaces
blueprint-change blocked until ownership is recorded
effectiveness-metrics useful for comparing package-specific work
source_of_truth_registry_status: shared docs versus package code ownership unresolved
task_specific_maturity: documentation: minimal when shared docs owner is known
framework upgrade: incomplete until bridge and ownership registry are accepted
bridge_capability_status: existing bridge files must be preserved unless explicit approval allows overwrite
bridge capability matrix required before claiming multi-assistant conformance
operation_help_status: operation help must route by package, task profile, and module state before edits
output_contract_status: adapter output contracts required for installation, framework update, and package-scoped recheck evidence
ai_infrastructure_inventory_status: AI infrastructure inventory required before preserving or replacing existing bridge and assistant surfaces

unresolved: package-specific validation commands are not known

residual_risk: public docs versus package code ownership
single adapter maturity result for all task areas
